sentences.text: Hello, and thank you for calling Vine Ville Christian towers. Our office hours are eight AM until five PM Monday through Friday, if you reach this greeting during this time we are either on another line or away from our desk. Please listen carefully to the following menu options. If you know your party's three, digit extension you may enter it now to speak with our to leave a voice message for the front desk please press zero for service coordinator Susan Daniels. Please press one for service coordinator else and Nelson press two for the maintenance supervisor press three for that administrator is assistant press four or to speak with the administrator please press five thanks again for calling your call is being transferred please hold. Hello, you've reached the voicemail of Deborah Duncan administrator for Barren. Bill Christian towers. Please leave your name telephone number and a brief message and I will return your call as soon as possible. Thank you for calling and have a great day.
